ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_assets" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media asset */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media asset (e.g., image, video, audio) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media asset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media asset was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media asset */,
  "media_category" TEXT /* Category of the media asset (e.g., photos, videos, audio) */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the media asset is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset the metadata belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media asset */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption or description of the media asset */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the media asset was taken or created */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the media asset has received */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Camera model used to capture the media asset */,
  "aperture" REAL /* Aperture value of the camera */,
  "shutter_speed" REAL /* Shutter speed of the camera */,
  "iso" INTEGER /* ISO value of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_metadata_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag or keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the media asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the media asset */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., v1, v2) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset being shared */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the media asset was shared */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_shares_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_shares_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)
